arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Inter vs Monza – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Saturday's Serie A action concludes at Stadio Giuseppe Meazza as Inter and Monza go head-to-head in a 'David vs Goliath' clash. It's worth noting that 44 points separate the table-topping hosts from the rock-bottom visitors, highlighting the substantial gulf in quality between the two teams. arts.ttl: Inter play Monza to hold onto first place
arts.sum: This game will see Serie A’s best attack take on the leagues third worst defence this season: 60 goals scored by Inter, 45 goals conceded by Monza (only less than the 56 conceded by Hellas Verona and the 46 conceded by Parma). This will be the sixth meeting between Inter and Monza in Serie A, with the Nerazzurri winning two of the previous five Lombard derbies (D2 L1).
